query: I have a Sales Overview page with a Region slicer and a Product Category slicer. How do I make it so clicking the Region slicer filters the matrix but NOT the KPI cards at the top?
why: Editing visual interactions (filter/none per pair) is core to this skill.

query: want to add buttons on my exec dashboard page so users can jump between the Summary, Detail, and Trend tabs without using the page tabs at the bottom
why: Page navigation buttons/navigators are a primary feature of this skill.

query: Set up a bookmark that hides the YoY columns and another that shows them, with a toggle button to switch between the two states on my Finance report
why: Capturing report state in bookmarks + toggle button is exactly this skill.

query: On my Customer 360 report I want users to right-click a customer name and go to a focused page showing just that customer's orders, payments and tickets
why: Describes a drillthrough page (filter scope = drillthrough) without naming it; this skill's domain.

query: how do i make a hover popup that shows a mini trend chart when you mouse over a bar in the revenue visual
why: Report-page tooltips are listed explicitly in the skill's When to Use.

query: Need to make my Operations report usable on phones — the layout is a mess in the Power BI mobile app, visuals overlap
why: Building the portrait mobile layout is Step 7 of this skill.

query: color the cells of my matrix red/yellow/green based on whether each store hit its margin target, and add data bars to the units column
why: Conditional formatting of tables/matrices is in scope (data bars, rules-based color).

query: i set up a slicer but when readers open the report it resets — can i lock a default filter selection and also let them clear all slicers with one button?
why: Slicer behavior + a clear-all bookmark/button is interactive-report authoring.

query: I want one chart to highlight the related slice in the donut chart when I click a column, instead of filtering everything else out
why: Cross-highlight vs cross-filter is the visual-interactions decision this skill owns; competes with mapping-questions-to-charts but wins.

query: apply a consistent corporate color theme across all the pages of the report and save it so new visuals pick it up automatically
why: Applying a report theme is Step 6 of this skill.

query: My matrix lets me expand from Category to Subcategory to Product by clicking the +. How do I configure that drill-down hierarchy and the drill buttons in the visual header?
why: Drill up/down within a single visual -> drill-pattern-design (the skill explicitly defers this).

query: Which chart should I use to show monthly sales vs target with the variance — clustered bars, a bullet chart, or a line+column combo?
why: Choosing the chart type for a business question -> mapping-questions-to-charts.

query: I built the report in Desktop, now I need to publish it to the Marketing workspace and share it with the sales team via an app with the right permissions
why: Workspaces, apps, sharing and permissions -> publishing-and-sharing-content.

query: Regional managers should only see their own region's rows in every visual automatically based on their login — how do I set that up?
why: Per-user data restriction by login = dynamic RLS -> securing-row-level-access, not report filters.

query: How do I lay out 6 visuals on a single executive dashboard page — what goes top-left, sizing, grouping for an exec audience?
why: Multi-visual layout/composition for an audience -> dashboard-composition.

query: I want a Key Influencers visual to show what drives customer churn, and a decomposition tree to break it down by segment
why: AI visuals (Key Influencers, Decomposition Tree) -> ai-powered-analysis-selection.

query: Add a measure that computes YTD sales and % of total, then I'll use it to color my table — can you write the DAX?
why: Writing the DAX measure -> authoring-dax-measures (the measure feeds, but the ask is the DAX itself).

query: the report is super slow when i open it, the matrix takes 15 seconds — how do i find the slow visual and speed it up?
why: Slow report diagnosis with Performance Analyzer -> optimizing-model-performance.

query: I need a pixel-perfect printable invoice-style report with a fixed A4 layout and page footers that I can export to PDF
why: Pixel-perfect printable RDL -> building-paginated-reports, not interactive report pages.

query: set the relationship between FactSales and DimDate to single-direction and make the slicer on the date table filter the fact correctly
why: Cross-filter direction at the model/relationship level -> modeling-semantic-data (despite 'slicer/filter' keywords).
